hero.title: Bottle
hero.subtitle: Launch bottles into the Pacific Ocean and track their drift using real ocean current data.
players.title: Players
bottles.title: Active Bottles
footer.text: Bottle Quest · Ocean currents & drift simulation
about.title: About Bottle Quest
about.description: Bottle Quest is an ocean drift simulation experiment. Messages in bottles are launched from Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and tracked as they drift across the Pacific Ocean using real ocean current data.
about.how.title: How It Works
about.how.text: Each bottle is assigned a drift trajectory based on actual ocean current models. The simulation updates bottle positions periodically, allowing players to track their bottles' journeys across the ocean.
about.join.title: Join the Quest
about.join.text: Want to launch your own bottle? Sign up and add your message to the Pacific!
bottles.detail.author: Author
about.subtitle: A creative writing game powered by ocean currents.
about.how_1: Write a story, poem, or message on patrouch.ca/games/bottles
about.how_2: Place your message in a virtual bottle and launch it from Puerto Vallarta
about.how_3: Real-time ocean current data simulates the drift every 6 hours
about.how_4: Track your bottle on the map as it crosses the Pacific
about.how_5: If it beaches, someone can discover and open it
about.currents_text: Bottles follow real current patterns across the Pacific Ocean. Each bottle is influenced by the dominant current zone it passes through.
about.zone_mex: Seasonal loop along the Mexican coast
about.zone_neq: Westward flow toward the Central Pacific
about.zone_npg: Clockwise circulation of the Great Pacific
about.zone_per: Cold northward flow along South America
about.bottle_types_text: Fill your bottle with any creative work:
about.beaching_text: When a bottle approaches within 15 km of the coastline, it may beach. Beached bottles wait to be discovered. The finder sees the metadata but the message stays encrypted until opened.
about.crypto_text: Each bottle carries an encrypted message using a unique key. Only the finder can reveal the contents — protecting the intimacy of what was written.
about.cta_text: Head to patrouch.ca to write your message and send it to sea.
